[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 11010001 4
2 10111001 5
3 00010011 3
4 11110111 7
5 01010011 4
6 10101010 4
7 00000011 2

01 10 00111010 4
12 21 00000000 a match 0
23 32 01000000 1
34 43 01010011 4 match 5
45 54 00000010 1
56 65 00000010 1
67 76 00000011 2 match 7
70 07 01010011 4 match 5

02 20 01000000 1
13 31 10110010 4
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 10100010 3
46 64 00000011 2 match 7
57 75 00000010 1
60 06 00000011 2 match 7
71 17 00010010 2

03 30 01110011 5
14 41 00010010 2
25 52 00000000 a match 0
36 63 00000011 2 match 7
47 74 01010011 4 match 5
50 05 00101010 3
61 16 00000010 1
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 01010011 4 match 5
15 51 10101010 4 match 6
26 62 00000000 a match 0
37 73 01010011 4 match 5
